item.title:
OfficialPDC: PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 6min THE CHAMP IN WIGAN!
Chris Dobey defeats Justin Hood 8-4 to win his second Players Champi
item.description:
PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 6min THE CHAMP IN WIGAN!
Chris Dobey defeats Justin Hood 8-4 to win his second Players Championship title of 2026!
Hollywood has now won 10 ProTour events, with four of them coming in Wigan!
http:// bit.ly/PDCTVLive #PC9 7 6 35 3 mil

item.title:
livedarts: Live Darts @livedarts · 7min 𝗗𝗢𝗕𝗘𝗬 𝗗𝗢𝗘𝗦 𝗜𝗧 𝗔𝗚𝗔𝗜𝗡
Chris Dobey clinches his second Players Championship title of the sea
item.description:
Live Darts @livedarts · 7min 𝗗𝗢𝗕𝗘𝗬 𝗗𝗢𝗘𝗦 𝗜𝗧 𝗔𝗚𝗔𝗜𝗡
Chris Dobey clinches his second Players Championship title of the season and a tenth in total by defeating Justin Hood (102.9) in the final in Wigan with a 105.3 average 1 9 565

item.title: PDCEurope: PDC Darts Europe @PDCEurope · 7min What a performance! Chris Dobey wins Players Championship 9! Hollywood defeats Just
item.description: PDC Darts Europe @PDCEurope · 7min What a performance! Chris Dobey wins Players Championship 9! Hollywood defeats Justin Hood by 8-4 in tonight’s final in Wigan! 1 2 105
